description: Fisher information scalar curvature |R| for the 3D Heisenberg model on L x L x L periodic cubic torus at beta_c

data.note: Campaign 2 (A100). Campaign 1 (H100): 3682 +/- 29, 9/10 JK, d_eff=1.013. Two independent campaigns agree within 2%.

notes.method_detail: Wolff cluster algorithm with FFT-accelerated Fisher matrix computation, 1M total samples with jackknife error estimation
notes.d_eff_definition: d_eff(L1 -> L2) = log(|R(L2)|/|R(L1)|) / log(n2/n1), where n = L^3
notes.convergence: d_eff oscillates around 1.01-1.03, converging toward predicted 1.017. At L=10: d_eff(9->10) = 1.013 (both campaigns).
notes.two_campaigns: L=10 was computed independently on H100 (3682 +/- 29) and A100 (3614 +/- 37). Both give d_eff(9->10) = 1.013.
notes.compute: L=4-8 on RTX 4090; L=9-10 on RunPod H100/A100
